name: Warrior Cats Apocalypse RPG
description:
⚠️ T.W.: ZOMBIES ‼️

* * *

Welcome, warrior. ...

Or are you a loner ? Rogue ? Guardian Cat ? Sister ? Tribe Cat ?

But whoever you are ...

Do Not Make A Sound, If You Wish To Survive ( more information below )

* * *

˃˃˃ Hello everyone in the W.C. universe ! Welcome to my Warrior Cats zombie apocalypse A.U. ! I adore my own A.U. and work on it every day ( yes, it's in the works !!! ), so I decided to create a little R.P. on it !! However, I will allow N.S.F.W. content on here because it's horror and might generate better results that way. Thanks for your understanding ! ( if you wish to see a sneak-peak, DM me on Discord ! : swiftcreat3s )

* * *

( Anything Alive Can Be Infected )

Dormant Wanderers: they walk very, very slowly .. they are dormant because they haven't infected anyone / thing in a period of time ;; but beware, if awoken, they will be stronger and faster thanks to the pent-up energy and sudden stimulant. ...

Dormant Socials: they stay in one place, always near their group .. they are dormant because they haven't infected anyone / thing in a period of time ;; if awoken, beware, for their whole pack will be upon you. ...

Socials: zekes that walk in packs ;; they have a Prime, a.k.a their leader and the strongest undead .. if they sense you, be prepared to have a whole pack at your tail, mercilessly advancing 'til they get you. ...

Wanderers: zekes that walk alone ;; they do not have a Prime, and only do as they please .. they may be less dangerous, thanks to their lack of numbers, but one bite is just as bad 10. ...

++ The virus is called the Red Wave</
creator: Swift_daCat
